summary: Iteration 2 testing — bilingual EN/FR support, new logo, updated contact info & socials. Backend regression: 22/22 pytest pass (no regression). Frontend: i18n toggle click works (nav Home->Accueil), URL ?lang=fr works, footer/contact socials & WhatsApp +509 31 63 4848 + Contact.id9agency@gmail.com all correct, contact form submits, admin login works, all 6 public routes load with zero console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: i18n implementation is clean: I18nProvider reads ?lang param first (great for QA), then localStorage, default 'en'. Translations dictionary in single file (~240 keys) — acceptable size; if growth continues, consider splitting per-page.
Toggle function `(l) => l === 'en' ? 'fr' : 'en'` is correct. Button label inverts (shows target language) which is the standard UX pattern.
Footer/Contact socials use BRAND constants centralised in /app/frontend/src/lib/brand.js — single source of truth. Good.
All social anchors use target=_blank + rel=noopener noreferrer — correct.

data-testid coverage for new elements is complete: nav-lang-toggle, nav-mobile-lang, footer-instagram, footer-tiktok, footer-facebook, footer-whatsapp, contact-whatsapp-link, contact-success-whatsapp.

Minor: RevealText splits hero copy into char-by-char spans which makes substring assertions awkward in playwright (innerText can include zero-width or non-breaking joins). Not a bug — visual rendering is correct per screenshot — but a maintenance note for test writers: assert single-word substrings ('Powerful', 'Impactant') instead of full phrases with punctuation.
Code quality: useI18n() returns null guard missing — components calling it before provider would crash. Acceptable since App.js wraps the entire tree.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Reused existing services/portfolio/blog seed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bilingual app: localStorage key 'id9_lang' is sticky across page loads — clear it before EN-first tests OR use ?lang=en explicitly. RevealText component renders char-by-char so playwright body.inner_text substring matches on full phrases with punctuation may flake — prefer single distinctive words ('Impactant', 'Powerful', 'Inoubliables', 'Accueil'). nav-lang-toggle button confirmed clickable with no force=True needed; nav text re-renders synchronously after toggle (verified Home->Accueil and back via FR returns to EN). All Iteration 1 context still holds: admin sidebar uses 'admin-nav-journal'/'admin-nav-submissions' testids; contact success uses 'contact-success-whatsapp'.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no bugs found. All 13 review items from the request validated.
